nodes.name: Replay Entry
nodes.notes: Contract B replay entry. 05-dlq-replay re-injects the original issue payload with replay:true and the same correlation_id.

nodes.name: SLA Scan Cron
nodes.notes: Scheduled scan path. Uses GITHUB_REPO/GITHUB_TOKEN/GITHUB_SLA_LABEL and emits the oldest breached open issue.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Normalize Issue').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'sla', step: 'scan-breach', status: 'skipped', payload: { reason: 'duplicate event', key: p.idem_key, issue: p.issue_number, repo: p.repo } } }];

const p = $('Normalize Issue').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id } }];

const p = $('Normalize Issue').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'sla', step: 'scan-breach', status: 'started', payload: { source: p.source, repo: p.repo, issue_number: p.issue_number, priority: p.priority, age_h: p.age_h, sla_hours: p.sla_hours, execution_id: p.execution_id } } }];

const p = $('Normalize Issue').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'sla', step: 'approve-escalation', status: 'skipped', payload: { decision: 'rejected_or_timed_out', repo: p.repo, issue_number: p.issue_number } } }];
